overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character piloting a small steam boat through the Port of Saint Denis harbor, then disembarking to walk along wooden docks past 19th-century port buildings. The scene features atmospheric hazy morning light with industrial smokestacks and docked steamboats.

events.description: boat approaches wooden dock and character prepares to disembark

agents.ego_description: piloting a small steam boat through calm harbor waters toward the dock

entered.detail: small wooden vessel with brass steam chimney emitting white smoke
multi-deck paddle steamer with two tall smokestacks
two-story stone building with green trim and arched windows
tall factory chimneys emitting dark smoke into hazy sky
tall wooden masts of docked sailing vessels

segments.scene_description: Navigating a small steam boat through the hazy harbor of Saint Denis, passing large docked steamboats and sailing ships. The Port of Saint Denis building is visible in the distance beyond the industrial smokestacks as the boat approaches the wooden dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: 19th century waterfront promenade with port buildings

events.description: character disembarks from boat and begins walking on wooden dock planks
walking toward bright morning sun creating strong silhouettes and lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden docks exploring the port area, passing various buildings and NPC pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and suspenders walking across the dock
dock worker standing near cargo pallets

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
black iron lamp post with glass enclosure
green painted building with white trim and LEMOYNE signage
dark green wooden building with arched windows and company signage
octagonal roofed wooden ticket booth with glass windows
wooden shipping crates and pallets stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden docks of Saint Denis past the Port building and various waterfront structures. The character passes NPC pedestrians and dock workers while the bright morning sun creates dramatic backlighting. The large steamboat remains docked on the right as the character explores the harbor area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from the water's surface through a hazy industrial harbor and onto the bustling wooden docks of Saint Denis. It begins aboard a small steam boat navigating through a thick morning haze, gliding past massive docked steamboats and sailing ships toward the distant Port building and towering smokestacks. As the boat reaches the shoreline, the perspective shifts seamlessly to a walk along the weathered wooden piers, leaving the water behind. The scene then opens up into a bright, sun-drenched waterfront where dramatic backlighting illuminates pedestrians and dock workers moving past various port structures. Finally, the camera continues its path along the harbor area, keeping the large steamboat in view on the right while exploring the detailed architecture of the 19th-century port.
